Oracc: SAAo/SAA01 — The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West

SAA 01 173. A Report on the State of the Province (ABL 0224)[via saao/saa01]

Obverse
o 1o 1

a-na LUGAL EN-ia

(1) To the king, my lord: your servant Adda-hati. Good health to the king, my lord!

o 22

ARAD-ka m10—ḫa-ti

o 33

lu ⸢DI-mu⸣ a-⸢na⸣ LUGAL EN-ia

o 44

DI-⸢mu⸣ [a-na EN.NUN]-ia a—dan-niš

(4) My [guard] is in excellent condition, the who[le dist]rict of [Hamath] is well. [The king], my [lord], can be glad.

o 55

DI-⸢mu⸣ [a-na KUR.na-gi]-ie

o 66

ša [KUR.ḫa-ma-te gab]-bu

o 77

⸢lib⸣-[bu ša LUGAL EN]-⸢ia⸣

o 88

⸢lu⸣-[u DÙG.GA-ba]

o 99

⸢TAv⸣ [É LUGAL be]-lí

(9) We have not heard anything s[pecific] about the [Ara]bs si[nce the king], my lord, [went] to [...]; all is well.

o 1010

a-[na x x il-lik]-u-ni

o 1111

⸢ṭe*⸣-[e-mu ḫar]-⸢ṣu⸣

o 1212

ša [LÚv.ar]-⸢ba⸣-a.a

o 1313

la-a ni-iš-me

Reverse
r 1r 1

DI-mu a—dan-niš

Adapted from Simo Parpola, The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West (State Archives of Assyria, 1), 1987. Lemmatised by Mikko Luukko, 2009-11, as part of the AHRC-funded research project “Mechanisms of Communication in an Ancient Empire: The Correspondence between the King of Assyria and his Magnates in the 8th Century BC” (AH/F016581/1; University College London) directed by Karen Radner. The annotated edition is released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/saao/P334165/.
